name: Black Panther Party Free Breakfast for Children
anti_capture_mechanisms: distributed_operations: 45 independent city programs, each with own staff/kitchen/community relationships
pre_targeting_distribution: Hampton distributed content before FBI targeting began, not in response to it
no_single_killable_node: national BPP could be decapitated; 45 local programs could not be raided simultaneously
embedded_in_community: program was community relationship, not organizational asset
outcome: FBI destroyed the organizational form (BPP) but could not destroy the program content fast enough. FBI lobbied USDA to create the National School Breakfast Program (1975) — absorbing what could not be destroyed. 10,000+ children fed daily at peak. The having cannot be unmade.
notes: Primary empirical base for anti-capture architecture theory. 'Build like Hampton. Don't die like Hampton.' Key structural lesson: distribution was architecturally inherent, not a response to threat.
